sentence: 他在家和在公司的态度反差很大。
pinyin: Tā zài jiā hé zài gōngsī de tàidu fǎnchà hěn dà.
english: There is a big contrast between how he acts at home and at work.

sentence: 他有一个嗜好，就是收集各种旧钱币。
pinyin: Tā yǒu yí gè shìhào, jiùshì shōují gèzhǒng jiù qiánbì.
english: He has a hobby of collecting all kinds of old coins.

sentence: 我们计划在三月上旬出发旅游。
pinyin: Wǒmen jìhuà zài sānyuè shàng xún chūfā lǚyóu.
english: We plan to set off on our trip in the first ten days of March.

sentence: 这次运动会的吉祥物是一只小熊猫。
pinyin: Zhè cì yùndònghuì de jíxiángwù shì yī zhī xiǎo xióngmāo.
english: The mascot for this sports meet is a little red panda.

meaning: 1. to occupy by force; 2. to seize; 3. to dominate
sentence: 他把共用的桌子霸占了一整天。
pinyin: Tā bǎ gòngyòng de zhuōzi bāzhàn le yī zhěng tiān.
english: He monopolized the shared table for an entire day.
